commands.review_summary:
The branch adds policy rule reference tables and, because it is stacked, also carries the tool-posture conformance implementation from https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/85482.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a stacked policy/docs PR rather than a bug report. The review used the PR diff, current main docs, and the linked parent PR proof instead of a failing reproduction path.
